name: build-until-done
default_program:
[stages: evaluate>select>implement>verify>loop>audit |
 scope: diff|repo|paths(glob,...) |
 policy: evidence,correctness-first,loop-until-done,approval-gates{blockers-only} |
 lens: contract-evidence-verifier |
 output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: MISSION_GOAL
required_inputs.description: One bounded mission to execute until the done contract is proven or a real blocker stops progress.

required_inputs.name: TARGET_SCOPE
required_inputs.description: Exact scope the mission is allowed to touch.

required_inputs.name: DONE_CONDITION
required_inputs.description: Explicit completion contract. Each condition must be externally checkable — no vibe-based success language.

required_inputs.name: CURRENT_EVIDENCE
required_inputs.description: Observations, test results, or notes from any prior pass. When absent, reads TARGET_SCOPE to build initial evidence.

required_inputs.name: MAX_PASSES
required_inputs.description: Safety ceiling for passes within one turn. Default: 5.
